title: celtis australis var. eriocarpa
intro: Celtis australis var. eriocarpa, also known as the Australian nettle tree, is a variety of the Celtis australis tree, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Australian nettle tree is said to provide various health benefits, including relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, as well as support for the immune system. Celtis australis var. eriocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
